ddls:
CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the device */,
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the zone where the device is installed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the device */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the device is currently active */,
  "date_installed" TEXT /* Date when the device was installed */,
  "device_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the device */,
  "firmware_version" TEXT /* Current firmware version of the device */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Current software version of the device */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the device was last updated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the device was last calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_zone_id FOREIGN KEY ("zone_id") REFERENCES zones ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Camera, Temperature Sensor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_description_long" TEXT /* A longer description of the category */,
  "category_icon" TEXT /* Icon or image associated with the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "zones" (
  "zone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each zone */,
  "zone_name" TEXT /* Name of the zone (e.g., Terrazzo, Boilermaker Room) */,
  "building_name" TEXT /* Name of the building where the zone is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the zone */,
  "zone_description_long" TEXT /* A longer description of the zone */,
  "zone_map" TEXT /* Map or layout of the zone */,
  "zone_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the zone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("zone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_description_long" TEXT /* A longer description of the status */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance log entry */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "maintenance_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_logs_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device that triggered the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Malfunction, Security Breach) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_acknowledged" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was acknowledged */,
  "alert_resolved" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Maintenance Staff) */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "user_job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Detailed list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "device_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "device_id" TEXT /* ID of the device being monitored */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., uptime, response time) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "recorded_at" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the metric (e.g., percentage, seconds) */,
  "metric_threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the metric */,
  "metric_warn_threshold" REAL /* Warning threshold value for the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_device_performance_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the notification is sent */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action taken */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action taken */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
